notes: Crustacean braggadocio rap. 'Clack clack' is the onomatopoeic signature — the claw on the snare. Playful amber throughout. 'Prawn, prawn, prawn' is a three-beat taunt. 'One guitar, two claws' is the declaration. Final 'Clack clack' closes the song.

chunks.note: Rock lobster, mob lobster, whole reef on lock — opening declaration
Clack clack — that's the claw on the snare — hook #1, mixed (sound becomes signal)
Clack clack — lobster trap if you dare — hook #1 pt2
When the rock lobster snap you clear the whole tide flow — peak verse
I'm the crustacean your crustacean told you about — the boast
Clack clack — final signature, mic drop
